sections.heading: Speed and accuracy building drills
sections.body:
Practice these words and sentences:

Words: about their which would there could other after thought people because through between become country history program question general believe million remember nothing already example however perhaps certainly

The best error message is the one that never shows up.
First solve the problem then write the code.
Simplicity is prerequisite for reliability.
The most dangerous phrase is we have always done it this way.
Programming is not about typing it is about thinking.
Code is like humor when you have to explain it it is bad.
It works on my machine works on mine too

sections.heading: Practice Tips
sections.body:
1. Keep your eyes on the screen
2. Use proper finger placement
3. Start slow, accuracy first
4. Speed will come with practice

jargon.definition: Words Per Minute - typing speed measure

summary: Complete this lesson to improve your Speed and accuracy building drills skills.
